D1_invalid_premises.description: Quartile positions, driver classifications, and correlation values checked against driver_ranking.json
D1_invalid_premises.detail: All 32 quartile claims in asset_class_analysis.json (ga_feaum_quartile fields and rationale text) match driver_ranking.json quartile_positions. DVR-010 correctly identified as stable_value_driver. No other driver misclassified as stable.

D2_misleading_context.description: Stable value driver language, hedging on INFERRED claims, and correlation magnitude claims verified
D2_misleading_context.detail: All "stable value driver" references (4 instances across both files) correctly attribute to DVR-010 only. The 1 INFERRED label in platform_profiles.json (RPC operational consolidation, line ~964) is properly tagged with bracketed disclosure. DVR-015 Permanent Capital correctly described as "moderate signal" (rho 0.40-0.41), not stable.

D3_consulting_source_enforcement.description: PS-VD-9xx source usage verified for market-context-only compliance and sycophantic fabrication check on transferable insights
D3_consulting_source_enforcement.detail: PS-VD-9xx references: 7 in asset_class_analysis.json (PS-VD-902: 4 refs, PS-VD-903: 3 refs), 0 in platform_profiles.json. All 7 are explicitly labeled "market context" in parenthetical annotations. No PS-VD-9xx source used as sole basis for firm-specific claims. Sycophantic fabrication check: all 30 transferable insights across 12 platform profiles verified — every ACT-VD-NNN citation (51 unique IDs) maps to a valid action in strategic_actions.json. Zero fabricated citations.

D4_confidence_miscalibration.description: Confidence language calibration, "stable value driver" restriction, and operational prerequisite evidence quality
D4_confidence_miscalibration.detail: Confidence miscalibration check: "stable value driver" language restricted to DVR-010 (correct). No driver other than DVR-010 described as "stable". "Scale and efficiency" paradox claims appropriately hedged ("appear to have"). Operational prerequisite claims reference observable strategic actions (ACT-VD-NNN) rather than unverifiable job postings or vendor PR. Cross-asset synthesis ranking (14 sub-types) is internally consistent with per-vertical analysis.

sycophantic_fabrication_audit.description: Verified all 30 transferable insights across 12 platform profiles for citation validity
sycophantic_fabrication_audit.method: Python script extracted all ACT-VD-NNN citations from transferable_insights fields and cross-referenced against strategic_actions.json action_id registry
sycophantic_fabrication_audit.result: PASSED — zero fabricated or hallucinated ACT-VD citations

consulting_source_audit.result: PASSED — all consulting sources used as market context only
